item.title: Researchers Explore Gold Nanoclusters as a Potential Quantum Technology Platform
item.summary: Insider Brief New technical disclosures from Penn State and University of Toronto researchers suggest gold could be a foundational platform material for quantum computing, sensing, and communication. A technical update just issued by Delta Gold Technologies (Aquis: DGQ / OTC: DGQTF / FRA: O2J) has made a strong case for gold nanoclusters as a genuinely […]
